title: heliophila crassistyla
intro: Heliophila crassistyla, also known as the Cape Bachelorette or the Rough Heliophila, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Heliophila crassistyla include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a tea from its leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
